headline: Intel Rises 38.4% in Six Months: How to Play the Stock?
summary: INTC rides a 38.4% surge on booming AI demand, new chips and key partnerships. Can its expanding portfolio and valuation make it a smart buy now?

headline: TechCon Global Announces Dr. Irwin Jacobs as Recipient of the TechCon Fellows Lifetime Achievement Award
summary: San Diego, California--(Newsfile Corp. - April 7, 2026) - TechCon Global, a leading platform dedicated to fostering innovation, entrepreneurship, and investment ecosystems, is proud to announce that Dr. Irwin M. Jacobs, co-founder of Qualcomm and a pioneer of modern wireless communications, has been selected as a recipient of the prestigious TechCon Fellows Lifetime Achievement Award.The TechCon Fellows Award recognizes visionary leaders whose groundbreaking contributions have shaped industries,
